mainEntity.name: Are there free AEO tools for Chicago solo attorneys?
mainEntity.text: Are there free AEO tools for Chicago solo attorneys?

acceptedAnswer.text: Free tools: Google's Rich Results Test, Schema.org generator, AnswerThePublic for questions, and manual AI query checks for Chicago solos.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Combine with low-cost audits; these handle basics like schema validation. Not full-service, but viable starters yielding 10-20% visibility. Upgrade for scale; solos risk time sinks without expertise.[1]
